title: Bubustein's Dark Textures
description: The dark textures for Bank Machine and ATM (not implemented)
body: [](https://modrinth.com/mod/bubustein-money) # Bubustein's Dark Textures **This is the official resource pack for Bubustein's Money** **It contains the Dark GUI of Bank Machine and soon will have the Dark GUI of ATM (soon after it will be implemented in the mod)**
